label: Thing style
description: A per-object visual style override applied by ideologies, expansion packs, and random-style systems to alter how a thing looks without changing its game behavior.

overrideLabel.label: Override label
overrideLabel.description: Optional display-name override shown in style pickers in place of the base thing's label.

graphicData.label: Graphic data
graphicData.description: Full graphic definition supplying the styled texture. Present in almost every shipped ThingStyleDef.

uiIconPath.label: UI icon path
uiIconPath.description: Explicit texture path for the icon shown in style pickers. Most styles derive their icon from graphicData instead.

uiIconScale.label: UI icon scale
uiIconScale.description: Scale multiplier applied to the UI icon. Shipped values range from about 1.06 to 2.0.

wornGraphicPath.label: Worn graphic path
wornGraphicPath.description: Texture path for the alternate graphic shown when apparel is worn on a pawn. Used by cultist masks and robe styles.

color.label: Color
color.description: RGBA tint applied to the resolved graphic. Rarely set in shipped data.

useWornGraphicMask.label: Use worn graphic mask
useWornGraphicMask.description: Enables worn-graphic masking for apparel. Private in source but present in Anomaly data (cultist masks).

basic-style.label: Basic style
basic-style.description: Minimal style with a graphicData block supplying the texture path and graphic class.

apparel-style.label: Apparel style
apparel-style.description: Style for apparel with a world graphic and a worn-pawn graphic path.
